iran_nuke.notes: Day 15 12:00 — FALLING STABLE. No new nuclear-specific signals. Kharg Island strikes target military assets, not nuclear infrastructure. US holding Kharg oil infrastructure 'hostage' to force Hormuz reopening — economic leverage, not nuclear escalation. Nuclear track continues de-escalation despite conventional escalation. Mojtaba Khamenei leadership instability a wildcard but no nuclear signals triggered. 14% (no change).

iran_conventional.notes: Day 15 12:00 — IMMINENT RISING. (1) US KARG ISLAND STRUCK: Massive 'precision strike' on Iran's oil export hub — 90% of Iranian oil exports flow through Kharg. CENTCOM released video. Trump: 'obliterated every military target' and threatened oil infrastructure next. (2) IRGC THREATENS US FORCES IN UAE — direct threat on Gulf state soil. (3) 6 US service members killed in KC-135 refueling plane crash in western Iraq. (4) Death toll exceeds 2,000. (5) New Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei vows to maintain Hormuz blockade. (6) ~500 tankers trapped in Persian Gulf. (7) Brent above $100. (8) Trump lifts Russia oil sanctions temporarily — Europe furious. Capped at 100.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 15 12:00 — IMMINENT RISING. (1) Axios: Israel planning MASSIVE ground invasion — seize entire area south of Litani River. 'Largest since 2006.' (2) Israeli strike on primary healthcare center in southern Lebanon killed 12 medical personnel (The Hindu). (3) 773+ killed including 100+ children. 800K-1M displaced. (4) 2 IDF soldiers killed, 14 wounded. (5) Hezbollah Radwan forces raiding northern Israel. 210+ rockets since March 2. (6) Entire families 'wiped out' — Guardian detailed report. (7) Israel agreed to spare Beirut airport but NOT other infrastructure. Capped at 100.

turkey.notes: CRITICAL RISING. Third intercept confirmed March 13 — NATO spokesperson Allison Hart: 'NATO remains vigilant and stands firm in its defence of all allies.' Sirens in Adana near Incirlik. Turkey formally asked Tehran to clarify. Iran denies targeting. Politico EU: one more intercept triggers Article 4 consultations. Multiple sources (NYT, Reuters, Bloomberg, Politico, France24) confirmed. 59 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 65. ONE intercept from IMMINENT/Article 4.

india.notes: ELEVATED STABLE. India strongly condemned Pakistan airstrikes on Afghanistan, supporting Afghan sovereignty (MEA spokesperson Jaiswal). India highlighted civilian casualties including women and children during Ramadan. No military escalation signals. Qatar mediating Pakistan-Afghanistan tensions. 20 (stable).

russia.notes: CRITICAL RISING. (1) TRUMP TEMPORARILY LIFTS RUSSIA OIL SANCTIONS amid Hormuz crisis — Europe furious. German Chancellor: 'decision is wrong, pressure on Putin should be increased.' Major economic lifeline for Russia. (2) ISW: Oil shock invalidates Russian economic pressure assumptions. (3) Russia condemns Bryansk strike as 'terrorist attack,' accuses Britain. (4) 1,278,430 total casualties, 810 killed/wounded last 24h. (5) Russia expanding drone production to 19,000/day, USF to 101,000 by April 1. (6) Putin-Trump call on Iran/Ukraine — no breakthrough. 30 + 8 (sanctions waiver) + 4 (Iran coupling) = 42.

china.notes: DETERRENT STABLE. China warplane flights near Taiwan plunged from 92 to 7 over two weeks — sharpest drop in years. US THAAD fully relocated from South Korea. China appears to be exercising strategic patience while US overextends in ME. PRC increased 2026 military budget. $14B Taiwan arms deal awaits Trump approval ahead of Xi summit March 31. No new signals. 12 + 6 (THAAD) - 3 (reduced flights) = 15.

north_korea.notes: CRITICAL RISING — MAJOR ESCALATION. (1) North Korea fired 10+ ballistic missiles in salvo Saturday morning March 14 — coordinated barrage from western coast. Japan confirms ~340km range into Sea of Japan outside EEZ. (2) Timed during US-South Korea 'Freedom Shield' drills — direct provocation. (3) Third provocation this week. South Korea JCS calls it 'unprecedented pace.' (4) Launches reject Trump's dialogue outreach. (5) Bloomberg: 'more than 10' missiles — NK News says 'around 10.' Multiple independent confirmations. 8 + 12 (missile test) + 10 (salvo) + 5 (rhetoric) + 6 (China coupling) = 41.

russia_ukraine.notes: CRITICAL RISING. (1) Trump temporarily lifts Russia oil sanctions — major economic lifeline, war economy benefits further from $100+ oil. Europe condemns move. (2) Zelenskyy: ME war 'bad news for Ukraine' — drawing attention and anti-aircraft missiles away. (3) Zelenskyy met Iran Shah's son in Paris, urged no Iran-Russia cooperation. (4) Russian strikes kill 4 near Kyiv, wound 15. (5) Russia expanding drone output to 19,000/day. (6) Polymarket: ceasefire by end March at 2% — effectively dead. (7) 810 Russian casualties last 24h, 1,278,430 total. 35 + 5 (Russia critical) + 5 (Turkey critical) + 5 (sanctions benefit) = 50.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: IMMINENT RISING — ESCALATION CONTINUES. (1) Pakistan PAF struck 51 locations in eastern Afghanistan, hit Kam Air fuel depot in Kandahar. 6 civilian deaths in latest Kabul strikes (Reuters/LA Times). (2) Afghanistan claims drone strike on Pakistan's 'Hamza' military center in Islamabad — if confirmed, unprecedented escalation hitting a capital city. Pakistan denies, says drones intercepted (India Today). (3) President Zardari: Taliban 'crossed a red line' with drone attacks on civilian targets. (4) Afghan drones injured 4 Pakistani civilians including 2 children. (5) Both sides claim strikes on other's territory. (6) UNAMA condemned civilian casualties. (7) Pakistan calls it 'open war.' (8) Nuclear-armed state in open war remains extreme escalation risk. 10 + 10 + 8 + 7 + 5 + 15 + 2 + 8 = 78 → 81.

IRGC THREATENS US FORCES IN UAE — Direct threat on Gulf state soil after Kharg strikes. UAE energy facility already struck. Gulf becoming active US-Iran combat zone (Al Jazeera)
DEATH TOLL EXCEEDS 2,000 in Iran war. 6 more US service members killed in KC-135 crash in Iraq (NBC/CNN)
NORTH KOREA FIRES 10+ BALLISTIC MISSILES in salvo during US-South Korea drills — THIRD provocation this week. 'Unprecedented pace.' Rejects Trump outreach (Reuters/Bloomberg/NK News)
TRUMP TEMPORARILY LIFTS RUSSIA OIL SANCTIONS amid Hormuz crisis — Europe furious. German Chancellor: 'wrong decision.' Major economic lifeline for Kremlin (Guardian/Reuters)
ISRAEL PLANNING MASSIVE GROUND INVASION of southern Lebanon — seize area south of Litani. 'Largest since 2006.' Healthcare center struck, 12 medics killed (Axios/The Hindu)
PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN: PAF strikes 51 locations. Zardari: Taliban 'crossed red line.' Drones hit near Islamabad. Both sides claim strikes on other's territory (Reuters/Hindustan Times)

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: ESCALATION — Day 15 12:00 SCAN. Global war probability 90% (IMMINENT). FIVE TRACKERS IMMINENT: Iran conventional (100), Israel-Lebanon (100), Pakistan-Afghanistan (73), Turkey near-imminent (65→71 with coupling). FOUR trackers critical. NO de-escalation signals in any theater. KHARG ISLAND STRIKE represents new phase — US targeting Iran's economic lifeline while threatening oil infrastructure next. DPRK 10+ missile salvo adds Pacific dimension. Trump's Russia sanctions waiver is geopolitical wildcard — may ease oil crisis but empowers Russia and angers European allies.

latest_news.headline: US strikes Kharg Island — Iran's oil export hub 'obliterated'
latest_news.text: US forces conducted 'large-scale precision strike' on Kharg Island, Iran's primary oil export hub handling 90% of oil exports. CENTCOM released strike video. Trump: 'obliterated every military target' and warned oil infrastructure could be next. If oil facilities hit, Iran could take months to a year to rebuild. China — main buyer of Iranian oil — would see biggest impact.

latest_news.headline: IRGC threatens US forces in UAE after Kharg strikes
latest_news.text: IRGC issued direct threat to US forces stationed in UAE following Kharg Island strikes. Second Gulf state now explicitly threatened. UAE energy facility already struck earlier. Gulf region transforming into active US-Iran combat zone.

latest_news.headline: Iran war death toll exceeds 2,000 — 6 US service members killed in Iraq plane crash
latest_news.text: Iran war death toll exceeds 2,000 killed. Six US service members died when their KC-135 refueling aircraft crashed in western Iraq. Total includes Iranian civilians, military, Hezbollah fighters, and US/Israeli forces. 18,551+ injured.

latest_news.headline: Trump temporarily lifts Russia oil sanctions — Europe furious
latest_news.text: President Trump temporarily eased US sanctions on Russian oil exports to address global supply crisis from Hormuz blockade. European leaders condemned the move — German Chancellor: 'decision is wrong, pressure on Putin should be increased.' Major economic lifeline for Russia's war economy at a time when $100+ oil already benefits Kremlin.

latest_news.headline: Israel planning massive ground invasion of southern Lebanon — seize area south of Litani
latest_news.text: Israel planning to significantly expand ground operation in Lebanon, aiming to seize entire area south of Litani River and dismantle Hezbollah military infrastructure. Described as 'largest since 2006.' Separately, Israeli strike on primary healthcare center in southern Lebanon killed 12 medical personnel.

latest_news.headline: North Korea fires 10+ ballistic missiles in salvo during US-South Korea drills
latest_news.text: North Korea fired more than 10 ballistic missiles from its western coast Saturday morning during US-South Korea 'Freedom Shield' drills. Japan confirms ~340km range into Sea of Japan outside EEZ. Third provocation this week. South Korea JCS: 'unprecedented pace of provocations.' Rejects Trump's dialogue outreach.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan: PAF strikes 51 locations, Zardari says Taliban 'crossed red line'
latest_news.text: Pakistan Air Force struck 51 locations in eastern Afghanistan. President Zardari declared Taliban 'crossed a red line' with drone attacks on Pakistani civilian targets. Afghan drones injured 4 Pakistani civilians including 2 children from debris. Both sides claim strikes on other's territory. Pakistan claims 32 sq km held in Zhob sector.

latest_news.headline: Russia expands drone production to 19,000/day, USF to 101,000 by April 1
latest_news.text: ISW reports Russia expanding unmanned systems forces to 101,000 end strength by April 1. Daily FPV drone production exceeds 19,000. Accelerating formation of drone units especially in southern Ukraine. Ukrainian counterattacks making operational and strategic gains in south.

latest_news.headline: Zelenskyy: Middle East war 'bad news for Ukraine' — drawing attention and missiles away
latest_news.text: Zelenskyy warned the Middle East conflict is diverting international attention and critical anti-aircraft missiles from Ukraine. Met Iran Shah's son in Paris, urged no Iran-Russia cooperation. Kyiv increasingly concerned about strategic isolation as US overextends.

latest_news.headline: 500 tankers trapped in Persian Gulf — Hormuz blockade paralyzes oil trade
latest_news.text: Around 500 oil tankers remain trapped in Persian Gulf due to Iran's de facto Strait of Hormuz blockade. New Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei vowed to maintain closure. Brent crude above $100/barrel. IRU warns prices could reach $120 in coming weeks if no resolution.

outlook: CRITICAL IMMINENT — Global war probability 90%. FIVE TRACKERS IMMINENT: Iran conventional (100), Israel-Lebanon (100), Pakistan-Afghanistan (73), Turkey near-imminent (71 with coupling). NEW PHASE: (1) KHARG ISLAND STRUCK — US targets Iran's economic lifeline (90% oil exports). Trump threatens oil infrastructure next. This is economic warfare escalation. (2) IRGC threatens US forces in UAE — Gulf becoming active combat zone. (3) Death toll exceeds 2,000. (4) 6 more US troops killed in Iraq crash. (5) Trump lifts Russia sanctions — Europe furious, Russia empowered. (6) DPRK 10+ missile salvo — Pacific dimension widening. (7) Israel plans massive Lebanon ground invasion — area south of Litani. (8) Pakistan-Afghanistan: 51 PAF locations struck, Taliban drones near Islamabad. WATCH: (a) Kharg oil infrastructure strike — would be point of no return for Iranian oil capacity. (b) 4th Turkey intercept → Article 4. (c) Lebanon ground invasion timing. (d) DPRK escalation trajectory — nuclear test risk. (e) Russia sanctions waiver geopolitical fallout. (f) Gulf state infrastructure campaign expansion. (g) US military overextension across 4+ fronts.
